ai.name: SoftDeletableEntity
ai.description: Abstract base class that extends AuditableEntity with soft-delete support.

docs.summary: Base class for entities that support soft deletion in addition to audit tracking.
docs.remarks: Entities derived from  are never physically removed from the data store. Instead, the  flag is set to and  records the time of deletion. Query logic should filter out soft-deleted entities by default.
